    Method
    Description
    Reforge
    ReforgeManager.getRandomReforge(String itemType, String currentRarity, String excludeReforgeId)
    Gets a random reforge for the given item type and rarity, excluding the specified reforge.

    Gets a reforge by its ID.

    Method
    Description

    ReforgeManager.getAllReforges()
    Gets all loaded reforges.
    List<Reforge>
    ReforgeManager.getApplicableReforges(String itemType, String currentRarity)
    Gets all reforges compatible with an item type that also meet the rarity requirement.
    List<Reforge>
    ReforgeManager.getReforgesForItemType(String itemType)
    Gets all reforges compatible with a specific item type.
